source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Dataflow_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Summary_Report_Import_1') AS Dataflow_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Pipeline_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Summary_Report_Import_1') AS Pipeline_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Summary_Report_Import_1') AS Src_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Summary_Report_Import_1') AS Src_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Src_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Summary_Report_Import_1') AS Src_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_Container_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Summary_Report_Import_1') AS Tgt_Container_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_filename_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Summary_Report_Import_1') AS Tgt_filename,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Tgt_path_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Summary_Report_Import_1') AS Tgt_path_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Table_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Summary_Report_Import_1') AS Tgt_Table_Name,
    (SELECT PARAMETER_VALUE FROM AZ_PARAMETERS WHERE PARAMETER_NAME = 'Schema_Name' AND PIPELINE_NAME = 'PPL_Tableau_QVRU_T_Th_1' AND DATAFLOW_NAME = 'DF_Summary_Report_Import_1') AS Tgt_Schema_Name;

activities.name: ST_Removes_Records_for_Re-load_intra_day
activities.description: DTSX Execute SQL Task 'Removes Records for Re-load intra-day'. Deletes today's records from Tableau_Summary530_CMAdjust and tbl_tableau_530_505_ee_other.

scripts.text:
delete from PLHS.dbo.Tableau_Summary530_CMAdjust
  where cast(Import_date as date)  = cast(getdate() as date) 
;

  delete from PLHS.dbo.tbl_tableau_530_505_ee_other 
  where cast(Import_date as date)  = cast(getdate() as date)

activities.name: DF_530_Summary_Report_Import_1
activities.description: DTSX Data Flow Task '530 Summary Report Import'. Source 'CM_Adjust': FlatFile (CSV), comma-delimited, CRLF row delimiter, double-quote text qualifier, CodePage 1252, ColNamesInFirstRow=True. 4 cols: VIIDWFGUID_+_Path, JAVA_PATH_ID, Adj_Consequence_Model_Escalation_Date, VIIDWFGUID. Derived Column: Import_date = currentDate(). Destination 'OLE DB Destination': [dbo].[Tableau_Summary530_CMAdjust] (6 cols).
